title: CONSTRUCTION PLANNER
description:
1. Master Programme & Detailed Scheduling

Develop, review, and maintain the Master Construction Programme, including baseline, recovery, and mitigation schedules.

Prepare detailed construction schedules aligned with procurement, approvals, and site constraints.

Monitor progress, identify delays, and propose programme recovery strategies.

Interface closely with project managers, consultants, and subcontractors to ensure schedule integrity.

2. Site Utilisation & Logistics Planning

Prepare Site Utilisation Plans (SUP) reflecting site access, hoarding, temporary facilities, material storage, lifting zones, and traffic flow.

Develop Logistics Plans addressing:

Material delivery sequencing

Access constraints and off-site storage (if applicable)

Coordination with authorities, neighbours, and stakeholders

Ensure site logistics are aligned with construction phasing and safety requirements.

3. Construction Phasing & Methodology

Develop Construction Phasing Plans illustrating logical sequencing of works from mobilisation to completion.

Ensure phasing strategies are practical, buildable, and coordinated with design, authority submissions, and temporary works.

Support method statements and staging proposals where required.

4. Risk Identification & Technical Problem Solving

Proactively identify programme, logistical, and constructability risks at early stages.

Highlight potential project challenges arising from design, site constraints, authority requirements, or sequencing conflicts.

Propose technical and planning-based solutions to mitigate risks and improve buildability and efficiency.

Support planning input for:

Authority submissions

Tender reviews

Change impact assessments

Claims or Extension of Time (EOT) evaluations (if required)

Candidate Profile / Minimum Requirements

Experience

Minimum 5 years of relevant experience in construction planning (preferably Singapore-based projects).

Proven experience in:

Main contractor or project management consultancy environments

Managing complex construction sequences and constrained sites

Experience in building projects (e.g. residential, commercial, hospitality sector) is preferred.

Technical Competency

Strong proficiency in Primavera P6 and/or Microsoft Project.

Solid understanding of:

Construction methodologies

Temporary works and site logistics

Authority processes and construction sequencing

Ability to interpret drawings and coordinate across disciplines.

postedCompany.description: Leading bespoke furniture specialist in Singapore for almost 20 years. Our major clients are globally renowned hotel and retail brands. Expand with us as we venture into retail and e-commerce sector.
postedCompany.name: TLE PTE. LTD.
